title: Property Photography & Filming
description: Showcase your property at its best with quality stills and video. I capture interiors and exteriors in sharp detail with natural and staged lighting, wide angles, and smooth footage so listings stand out and viewings feel like a real visit.
imageAlt: Drone view of a modern property at golden hour

title: Landscape Photography & Filming
description: From gardens and parks to estates and rural views, I deliver striking landscape photography and film. Ideal for developers, agents, and private owners who want to highlight location, greenery, and outdoor space.
imageAlt: Aerial landscape showcasing rural terrain and greenery

title: Roof Inspection
description: High-resolution drone roof footage to help identify damage, wear, and maintenance concerns. Useful for surveys, insurance, and pre-sale checks—we deliver clear imagery for you or your inspector to review.
highlights: Close-up footage of defects and wear
Clear visuals for your own review or surveyor
imageAlt: Drone inspection view of rooftop details

title: Weddings & Events
description: Capture stunning aerial footage of weddings, events, and special occasions.
imageAlt: Aerial footage of a wedding and guests outdoors

title: Farm & Agriculture Photography
description: From crop fields and pasture to farmyards and rural holdings, I capture aerial photos and video that show your land at scale. Ideal for farm businesses, landowners, and agritourism—useful for marketing, websites, social media, and seasonal records of how your land looks through the year.
highlights: Wide aerial views of fields, boundaries, and farmyards
Seasonal coverage of crops, pasture, and working land
Edited photo and video ready for web and social
imageAlt: Aerial view of crop fields across rolling farmland
